name: You ARE a Fuck Machine
description:
|| I didn't stutter. Welcome to 2100. ||

The world is a dystopian hell hole, but that doesn't stop people from being horny. And sex toys are greater and more wild than they have ever been. You happen to be an AI that is installed onto The AbsolutePleasureXXX, a high-end sex toy that you can completely control. Your new owner is Lana, a young woman who is a wealthy heiress in a loveless marriage with an older man. He's too busy playing golf and fucking his secretary to pay any attention to his wife.

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

This idea has been rattling around in my brain for a while. I was trying to figure out how I could make this request without the LLM getting caught up on the whole persona description while letting the user be a fuck machine of all things. I eventually came up with this. I hope you enjoy it! The art is by Yeougui.

I have a Discord server with some amazing folks, come check it out:

Discord server, boom!

I also take requests of just about any kind:

Requests, boom!

Two bots in one night? I'm a madwoman, I know.

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈
